negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_152
prompt: The video opens with a figure skater dressed in a sleek black outfit, gracefully gliding across the ice in an indoor rink. The rink is surrounded by a low white wall topped with a railing, and behind it, large, muted-gray, industrial-style walls with evenly spaced rectangular blocks are visible. Fluorescent lights attached to evenly spaced cylindrical rods suspended from the ceiling cast a bright, even glow over the scene. The skater begins by extending one leg backward while maintaining her balance on the other foot, transitioning into an elegant arabesque pose. Her arms flow smoothly, enhancing the fluidity of her movement. She then lowers herself back onto both feet, continuing her graceful motion across the ice. By the final frame, the skater has completed her sequence, standing upright with arms slightly extended, poised and ready for the next move.
